clusters.justification: These terms co-activate within cortico-limbic circuitry, representing the overarching macroscopic domain of processing valence, arousal, and emotional states.
Relying on striato-cortical circuitry, this grouping represents the macro-level functional axis of evaluating options, calculating worth, and driving goal-directed behavior.
Supported by the default mode network, this cluster encapsulates the high-level functional axis of internally constructed representations regarding oneself and other agents.
